_comment: Tier-2 trigger evals for core-fe: changed file → skill(s) skill-triggers.md must surface. Add a case when wiring a new file-pattern route.

cases.why: Route marker files must run the route-island skill.
Page components need composition + colocated tests.
Vendored shadcn primitives route through the shadcn skill.
TanStack Query hooks must follow react-best-practices.
E2E specs require stable data-testid conventions.
Design tokens and Tailwind entry must stay semantic.
Env template changes must stay documented and secret-free.
